---
title: "Home"
toc: false
---

::: {.home-hero}
::: {.hero-copy}
# Hi, I'm Justin

I'm a Year 1 SIT AAI student learning data engineering, visualization, and how to turn small ideas into useful projects.

::: {.hero-links}
[View my projects](about.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
[GitHub](https://github.com/Catefishh/){.btn .btn-outline-secondary}
[GenAI reflection](genai.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary}
:::
:::

::: {.hero-image}
![](images/logo.jpg){fig-alt="Website logo"}
:::
:::

## What I do

::: {.feature-grid}

::: {.feature-card}
### Data Engineering

I am learning how data moves from raw sources into cleaner, more useful formats.
:::

::: {.feature-card}
### Visualization

I am practising how to communicate patterns, trends, and insights clearly through charts and dashboards.
:::

::: {.feature-card}
### Machine Learning

I am experimenting with models and projects, including my first stock price prediction project.
:::

:::

## More about me

You can find my GitHub, showcased projects, and background on the [project page](about.qmd). I also wrote a short [reflection on how I use GenAI](genai.qmd) as part of my learning process.
